content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the left side of center but well within track bounds, continuing through the left curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 43 + 5 = 48
Waypoint 48: (5.4803, 2.7690)
Car position: (6.2678, 2.6095)
Bearing = atan2(2.7690 - 2.6095, 5.4803 - 6.2678) = atan2(0.1595, -0.7875)
= 180 - atan2(0.1595, 0.7875) = 180 - 11.46° = 168.54°
Current heading: 147.57°
Delta = 168.54 - 147.57 = 20.97° → left (positive)
